work_experience_normalized.position: Internship Production Engineer in Ground System Tests & A/C Completion Area, Final Assembly Line A400M
work_experience_normalized.description: Support to ground system tests area (ST35A/B, ST30 and ST 20) in the final assembly line A400M. Knowledge of manufacturing process in the GST A/C completion stations. Knowledge of basics and strategies related with ground tests and their implementation in aircraft systems validation and verification process (GTR-GT]. Management of industrial partners outstanding works, identifying their impact on the process, coordinating the study with manufacturing engineering and assuring the best coordination with the stations, minimizing costs and time. Support to WOs (Work Orders) and HNCs (Non-Conformities) closure. Support to improvement projects and lean philosophy implementation.
